name: crediwatch.com:covid19
prose:
# Crediwatch's Covid APIs API

An API collection for Covid 19 by Crediwatch

## Getting started

The Crediwatch's Covid APIs API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://api.example.com`.

## Authentication

No authentication is required to call this API.

## API reference

### GET /api/v1/status/call
Status Call
Returns a single record.

### GET /api/v1/status/sku
Status Sku
Returns a single record.

### GET /api/v1/verify/name
Verify Name
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `query`, `state`, `city`.

Sample response:

```json
{ "data": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] }
```

### GET /api/v1/verify/phone
Verify Business
Returns a single record.

### GET /api/v1/verify/sku
Verify Sku
Returns a single record.
